summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of /az/dashboard/orders. All 25+ requirements from the review request pass, including the critical historical bug: at 1366px desktop viewport, all 8 'Əlaqə saxla' contact buttons render with right-edge at x=1321 (well within 1366 viewport) thanks to sticky right-0 action column — no horizontal scroll needed. Mobile (390px) card layout shows correctly with no horizontal overflow. Contact modal, detail drawer (4 tabs), status dropdown, filter chips (multi-select + date AND-combine), empty states, and link formats (tel:+, wa.me digits-only, instagram without @) all behave per spec. No console errors (only React Router v7 future-flag warnings, unrelated). No '[object Object]', 'undefined', or 'VVhatsApp' typos rendered.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor (non-blocking): Both desktop and mobile StatusChangeMenu instances share a single openStatusFor state, so when a status menu opens for an order, BOTH instances (one hidden via md:hidden, one via hidden md:block) render the dropdown options in DOM. Functionally invisible to users but doubles DOM nodes for the open menu. Consider passing a layout discriminator or using two separate state slots.

OrderTab in OrderDetailDrawer applies whitespace-nowrap + text-ellipsis on every dd; long values like the long Instagram handle or note will be truncated inside the drawer's order tab. The page-level row tests passed (handle is in platform cell which uses truncate intentionally), but in the drawer's 'Sifariş' tab a long note would get '...'-truncated. Spec says drawer should show the note fully — consider whitespace-normal break-words for the note row, or remove truncation entirely in the order tab.

OrderContactModal Row component sets whitespace-nowrap on values; very long Instagram handles (e.g. @elvin_longusernameshop_official) could overflow the right column on narrow modals. Currently OK at default modal width but worth keeping in mind.
test_credentials: Registered fresh seller via POST /api/auth/register with random email qa.seller+<rand>@aioperator.local / Password123! / plan=combo (status 201, token returned).
seed_data_creation: None — orders are entirely frontend mock (MOCK_ORDERS) per spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders page is solid. Critical sticky-right action column verified at 1366px — every contact button right-edge is at 1321px. Filter combinations, status dropdown, modal, drawer (4 tabs), Google Maps link (format: https://www.google.com/maps?q=LAT,LNG), wa.me/tel:/instagram link formats all working. Only minor code-review notes about (a) duplicated dropdown DOM across desktop+mobile StatusChangeMenu instances when one is open, and (b) drawer 'Sifariş' tab applies whitespace-nowrap + ellipsis on dd which could truncate long notes. These are not blockers.

verified_checks.full_names: Cavid Əliyev / Səbinə Rzayeva / Aytac Məmmədova present
verified_checks.platform_cell_format: instagram rows show '@handle' only; whatsapp rows show formatted phone only — no 'Instagram'/'WhatsApp' text alongside icon
verified_checks.disabled_when_missing: AIO-1037 (no whatsapp/phone) -> wa & tel aria-disabled=true; ig still enabled because instagramHandle exists
verified_checks.drawer_tabs: messages, order, contact, address all present
verified_checks.mobile_390_layout: table hidden, mobile list shown, no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390)
verified_checks.console_errors: none (only React Router v7 future-flag warnings)
